name: VinuChain
description: VinuChain core protocol contracts — Special Fee Contract (SFC) for validator staking, NodeDriver/NodeDriverAuth governance, and the upgradeable Quota proxy backing the protocol's fee-refund (payback) system

contracts.name: SFC
contracts.description: Special Fee Contract — manages validator creation, stake delegation, epoch rewards, lockups, and slashing

contracts.name: NodeDriverAuth
contracts.description: Owner-controlled governance contract for network administration — queues and executes time-locked migrations, network rule updates, epoch advances, and nonce increments

contracts.name: NodeDriver
contracts.description: EVM-facing relay contract between NodeDriverAuth and the EvmWriter precompile — emits canonical events for validator weight/pubkey changes, network rule updates, and epoch advances

contracts.name: QuotaContract
contracts.description: Upgradeable payback proxy — manages per-address stake, hold-time-locked withdrawals, and fee-refund parameters; queried by the node to compute fee refunds when the Podgorica upgrade is active
